title: lupinus minimus var. hellerae
intro: Lupinus minimus var. hellerae, also known as Hellebore Lupine or Hellera's Lupine, is a rare, low-growing, and perennial plant species belonging to the lupine family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of this plant are thought to include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Lupinus minimus var. hellerae is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
